protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: Cultures were ... exposed to various detergents ... Triton X100, sodium deoxycholate ... Deviron C16 ... Deviron 13S9 ... AAV-MAX lysis buffer, CTAB ... Following incubation, cell debris was removed by centrifugation
